description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSYS2-CI that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy on a windows-latest environment to run four jobs with different MSYS2 configurations (MINGW64 and MINGW32 in Release and Debug modes). For each job, check out the repository, set up MSYS2 with specific packages, prepare a build directory, configure the build with CMake, build the project, and run basic tests with CTest.
